differentials.name: Aneurysmal dilatation of sinus of Valsalva
differentials.raw: Aneurysmal dilatation of sinus of Valsalva

context: Incidence:   0.02% Cx:   early aortic stenosis, aneurysmal dilatation of ascending aorta Incidence:   200 cases reported Cx:   regurgitation Cause: (a)  congenital: connective tissue disorder (Marfan), aortic insufficiency, bicuspid aortic valve, VSD (b)  acquired: infection (endocarditis, syphilis, TB), medial degeneration, trauma, hypertension
